name: Chocolate Eclair
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan with whole graham crackers; set aside.
2. Combine pudding mixes and milk in a bowl; stir until well mixed. Fold in whipped topping.
3. Spread mixture over graham crackers.
4. Top with another layer of graham crackers.
5. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter. Remove from heat and add remaining ingredients (corn syrup, milk, vanilla extract).
6. Spread the melted chocolate mixture over the top of the graham cracker layer.
7. Cover and refrigerate.
